blocks.body: Passive of phrasal verbs (Phrasal Verbs in Passive) is formed in the same way as the usual passive, but the preposition or participle remains after the verb. This is an important topic for the natural sounding of English.

{ "title": "7. Short summary", "items": [ "Passive of phrasal verbs: Object + be + V3 + particle/preposition.", "The participle/preposition ALWAYS remains with the verb.", "Типові: look after, bring up, call off, turn down, carry out.", "Verbs with prepositions: laugh at, deal with, rely on.", "by + agent is placed after the participle: brought up by her aunt.", "Adverbs are placed after the particle: looked after well.", "Do not change the preposition: laughed at (not: laughed on)." ] }
